creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:

-- Checking for modules 'gimp-2.0>=2.10;gimpui-2.0>=2.10'

--   Found gimpui-2.0, version 2.10.34

-- Configuring done (3.7s)
-- Generating done (0.4s)

until this PR is merged/resolved, this port, seemingly just the OPENEXR knob will not return the proper python when multiple versions are installed. I attached a patch that provides hint to cmake-core routines for finding python.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=262109

PR 262109 patch also fixes the issue if applied.
